title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-13
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-13

## Focus for Today
Revenue-first Vancouver real estate execution:
1) warm lead pipeline movement (buyer/seller)
2) sphere referral activation
3) one consumer-facing local market authority post
4) COI outreach with coffee conversion
5) light recruiting follow-up maintenance only

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (12)

**Message A (status + timing):**
"Hey [Name] — quick Vancouver market pulse check: are you still aiming to buy/sell in the next 3–6 months, or has your timeline shifted? I can send a 60-second update for your target area."

**Message B (booking CTA):**
"If useful, let’s do a quick 10-minute strategy call so you know your next move before the weekend. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (6)

"Hey [Name] — checking in before the weekend. If anyone in your circle is thinking about buying or selling in Vancouver this year, happy to help with a no-pressure game plan. I can also send a quick neighborhood value snapshot if useful."

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver homeowners: don’t list blind this spring — prep these 3 levers first."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re considering selling in Vancouver this season, focus on these 3 things before you go live:\n\n1) Price to attract early competition\n2) Prep your first-week presentation (photos + showings)\n3) Decide your negotiation terms before offers arrive\n\nComment ‘SPRING’ and I’ll send my pre-listing prep checklist."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral network across mortgage, legal, and inspection partners so clients get faster support. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what buyers/sellers are running into right now?"

## 5) Recruiting Maintenance (15-minute cap)

Send 2 warm recruiting follow-ups max using existing scripts. No new recruiting campaign build.

## End-of-Day Scorecard Targets
- Warm follow-ups sent: 12
- Past-client check-ins sent: 6
- Consumer posts published: 1
- COI intros sent: 3
- Coffee chats booked: 1
- Recruiting follow-ups sent: 2 (cap)
- Replies received: target 6+
- Calls booked: target 2+
- Consults booked: target 1+
